Product Details
Combined Oil Seals

Integrated rotary sealing structures for applications that need multiple lips, better contamination control, and compact packaging.

← Back to Product Center

Industrial Product

Combined Oil Seals

Suitable for wheel ends, heavy equipment, and industrial shafts where primary sealing and exclusion functions must work together.

CHX Combined Oil Seals use integrated lip and support structures to improve sealing life, contamination exclusion, and installation efficiency in demanding rotary equipment.

Integrated Functions

One assembly can support both lubricant retention and exclusion of external contaminants.

Heavy-Duty Protection

Useful in applications exposed to mud, water, dust, and harsh operating environments.

Service Efficiency

Integrated structures can simplify replacement and improve assembly consistency.
